actions.script: var el = document.querySelector('div[aria-label="Enter a prompt here"]') || document.querySelector('textarea[aria-label="Ask anything"]') || document.querySelector('.ql-editor'); if (!el) throw new Error('prompt input not found'); el.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); var sel = window.getSelection(); var range = document.createRange(); range.selectNodeContents(el); sel.removeAllRanges(); sel.addRange(range); document.execCommand('delete', false, null); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200)); document.execCommand('insertText', false, '${message}'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); var btn = document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Send message"]') || document.querySelector('button.send-button') || document.querySelector('button[class*="send-button"]') || document.querySelector('button[aria-label*="Send"]'); if (!btn) throw new Error('send button not found'); btn.click(); return 'message_sent';

await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var prev = ''; var stable = 0; for (var i = 0; i < 60; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); var els = document.querySelectorAll('div.markdown'); if (els.length === 0) { els = document.querySelectorAll('div[data-message-author-role="assistant"]'); } if (els.length > 0) { var txt = els[els.length - 1].innerText || ''; var hasGenImage = !!document.querySelector('generated-image img.image, single-image img.image, .generated-images img.image'); if (txt.length > 0 && txt === prev) { stable++; if (stable >= 2) { return txt; } } else if (hasGenImage) { var imgLoaded = !!document.querySelector('generated-image img.image.loaded, single-image img.image.loaded'); if (imgLoaded) { stable++; if (stable >= 1) { return txt; } } } else { stable = 0; prev = txt; } } } return prev || '';

for (var attempt = 0; attempt < 3; attempt++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('generated-image img.image, single-image img.image, .generated-images img.image, .attachment-container img.image'); for (var j = imgs.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) { var img = imgs[j]; if (img && img.src && img.src.startsWith('http') && img.classList.contains('loaded') && img.naturalWidth > 0) { return img.src; } } } return '';
